offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inefficient bid proposal writing causes missed project opportunities. We automate bid proposal writing instead of manual bid proposal writing.
problem: Inefficient bid proposal writing leads to missed project opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Participate in community forums for tool sharing
try_it: Let users try template-based proposal generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as proposal templates
Set default reminder schedules for proposals
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
